case.title: NEW ORLEANS CITY PARK IMPROVEMENT ASSOCIATION v. DETIEGE

opinion.h1: NEW ORLEANS CITY PARK IMPROVEMENT ASSOCIATION v. DETIEGE, 358 U.S. 54 (1958)
opinion.h4: NEW ORLEANS CITY PARK IMPROVEMENT ASSOCIATION v. DETIEGE ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE FIFTH CIRCUIT. No. 295. Decided October 20, 1958.
opinion.p: Ed J. de Verges for appellant.
358 U.S. 54 MOUNTS v. WEST VIRGINIA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF APPEALS OF WEST VIRGINIA. No. 125, Misc. Decided October 20, 1958.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
